title: Insight Junction Object Schema
description: Schema for Insight Junction objects connecting Evidence and Frame objects with fit scores

id.description: Unique identifier for this insight junction

evidence_id.description: ID of the Evidence object being evaluated

frame_id.description: ID of the Frame being applied to the evidence

fit_score.description: How well the evidence fits the frame - measures strategic alignment

insight_teaser.description: Concise summary of the key insight from this evidence-frame combination

insight_story_block.description: Human-readable prose blocks that tell the story of this insight

strategic_impact.description: Description of the business impact or strategic implications of this insight

confidence_level.description: Confidence in the insight based on evidence quality and fit

actionability_score.description: How actionable this insight is - measures potential for implementation

priority_level.description: Strategic priority of this insight based on fit and impact

related_insights.description: IDs of related insight junctions that complement or contrast with this one

implementation_notes.description: Notes about how this insight could be implemented or acted upon

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
